functions.name: addNgrok
functions.description: Configures a container resource for grok which is pre-configured to connect to the resource that this method is used on.
functions.signature: addNgrok(name: string, configurationFolder?: string, endpointPort?: number, endpointName?: string, configurationVersion?: number): NgrokResource

parameters.name: configurationFolder
parameters.description: The folder where temporary ngrok configuration files will be stored; defaults to .ngrok

parameters.name: endpointPort
parameters.description: The port of the endpoint for this resource, defaults to a randomly assigned port.

parameters.name: endpointName
parameters.description: The name of the endpoint for this resource, defaults to http.

parameters.name: configurationVersion
parameters.description: The output version of the ngrok configuration file.

functions.name: withAuthToken
functions.description: Adds a ngrok auth token to a ngrok resource.
functions.returns: The same reference to ngrok resource builder.

parameters.name: ngrokAuthToken
parameters.description: The ngrok auth token as a parameter resource.

functions.name: withAuthTokenValue
functions.description: Adds a ngrok auth token to a ngrok resource.
functions.returns: The same reference to ngrok resource builder.

functions.name: withTunnelEndpoint
functions.description: Configures a resource with endpoints as a ngrok tunnel endpoint.
functions.returns: The same reference to ngrok resource builder.
functions.signature: withTunnelEndpoint(resource: IResourceWithEndpoints, endpointName: string, ngrokUrl?: string, labels?: Dict<string,string>): NgrokResource

parameters.name: resource
parameters.description: The resource whose endpoint should be exposed through ngrok.

parameters.name: ngrokUrl
parameters.description: The ngrok URL to use, or `null` to allow ngrok to choose one.
